response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified video content as two VTuber performances.
2. Scene 1 (00:00-02:16): 'Ready Steady'. Performer: Takanashi Kiara, Ninomae Ina'nis, Mori Calliope. Original Artist: Giga. Lyrics found.
3. Scene 2 (02:16-02:22): Transition. No music.
4. Scene 3 (02:22-04:53): 'Be My Flame'. Performer: IRyS. Original composer: Nana Takahashi. Lyrics found. (Note: Video text displays 'BLAZING'/'Music: Camellia', which is likely a title error or alternative credit, but search confirms 'Be My Flame' as the song).
response.global_summary: The video features two musical performances by Hololive VTubers. The first is a joint performance of 'Ready Steady' by Takanashi Kiara, Ninomae Ina'nis, and Mori Calliope. The second is a solo performance of 'Be My Flame' by IRyS.

scenes.description: Joint performance of 'Ready Steady' by Takanashi Kiara, Ninomae Ina'nis, and Mori Calliope. Visuals feature intense stage lighting and choreography. Screen text indicates music by Giga.
scenes.performer_in_video: Takanashi Kiara, Ninomae Ina'nis, Mori Calliope
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ローリスクじゃ物足りなくなっちゃったし
有り余って笑っちゃうくらい
なんも無いなんて言ったってしょうがないし
お手上げでhi-five
前ならえで後に続いたってつまんねぇ
夢を語れ、追え！がこの街のstandard
ただ見てたいだけなんてのは嘘です
そろそろマイク頂戴
どうせならもう後戻りもできないくらいどうにかさせて
まだまだハマっていきたい
なんか、まるで恋してるみたい
好きになっちゃったぁつってさ
ならこのままキミを連れて
望むならどこまでも
i wanna欲しがってばかりで結構結構
もし叶うならこの先の世界を知りたい
行きたいready steady
ちょっとだけなら無茶だってしちゃいたいし
この世の全て奪っちゃうくらい
とはいえ語ってばっかじゃどうしようもないし
語尾跳ねてhi-fi
ねえ少しはこっち向いたらどう
気まぐれにハマらせたいだけ？
でも奪いたい震わせたい
目、耳、キミの燃えるheart
誰をもが羨む驚異のtrackとlyricで
魅せていくからretakeはしないで
だからこのままキミを連れて
望むならどこへでも
i wanna無いものねだるなら決行決行
早く夜よ明けて朝焼けに誓え
重い想い、熱量を叫べ
この声を聴け
音・音・音に、踊り狂え
i want more.
“are you ready？”
ならこのままキミを連れて
望むならどこまでも
i wanna欲しがってばかりで結構結構
もし叶うならこの先の世界を知りたい
行きたいready steady
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
It's not enough to be low-risk
I'm so overflowing, I'm gonna laugh
Saying 'there's nothing' just can't be helped
I give up, hi-five
Following along in a row is boring
Talk about your dreams, follow them! That's this city's standard
Just wanting to watch is a lie
Give me the microphone soon
If I'm gonna do it, I can't turn back now, so let me do it
I want to keep getting hooked
It's like I'm in love
I ended up liking it, I said
If you want, I'll take you along with me, wherever you want
I wanna, just wanting, it's fine, it's fine
If it comes true, I want to know the world ahead, I want to go, ready steady
If it's just a little bit, I wanna do something reckless
Enough to take everything in this world
Still, talking about it is hopeless
Flicking the word endings, hi-fi
Hey, if you look this way a little, what about it?
You just want to make me fall for your whims?
But I want to snatch it, I want to make it tremble, eyes, ears, your burning heart
With a threatening track and lyric that everyone envies
I'll show you, so don't retake it
So if you want, I'll take you along with me, wherever you want
I wanna, if I want something unavailable, it's a go, it's a go
Make the night break quickly, swear to the morning glow
Shout out your heavy thoughts and heat
Listen to this voice, dance like crazy to the sound, sound, sound
I want more, are you ready?
If you want, I'll take you along with me, wherever you want
I wanna, just wanting, it's fine, it's fine
If it comes true, I want to know the world ahead, I want to go, ready steady

scenes.description: Stage interlude with lighting effects. No singing.
Performance of 'Be My Flame' by IRyS. Screen shows 'BLAZING' but lyrics match 'Be My Flame'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Can’t control it anymore, I’m burnin’ up red
Crazy thoughts fillin’ my head
(Tension rising to the top, won’t look back, I’ll never stop)
Blazing, boiling, gettin’ hot
(It’s your fault, baby)
Fever burning up inside, it can’t be contained
Got my heart goin’ up in flames
Tell me you can feel the searing heat
(Come on and come on I wanna confess, baby oh baby I’m gettin’ obsessed)
Are you gonna run away, or burn up with me?
(Crank it up, crank it up, hotter and hotter, gonna be wanna be ready for more)
I’m caught in a heat wave, I’ll never get enough, fanning the flame of love
(And now it’s taking over)
Blazin’ fire, make me a believer, I’m gettin’ dizzy from the smoke in the air.
Wild desire, burnin’ like a fever, come hold me close if you dare!
Fire lover, be my flame
Keep me burning
Fire lover, call my name
Sweet love burn me away
I’m gonna wanna turn it up, I’m burnin’ up, can’t get enough
Maybe I’m too hot to touch, it’s your fault, baby
I can’t hide it anymore, I’m bearing my soul, let these flames swallow me whole
This is how we’re gonna play;
